goals.title: Migrate core subscription engine to multi-region active cluster

promotions.justification: Arjun's exceptional system management and leadership in engineering over the last 3 years have positioned him perfectly to steer the wider platform group.
Priya's strategic performance lowered CAC by 40% while doubling incoming leads, demonstrating strong leadership readiness.
